Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows markedly elevated serum creatinine, significant proteinuria, low serum protein and globulin, and abnormal urine findings (glucosuria, ketonuria, brown color, low specific gravity). These results suggest impaired renal function, likely nephrotic syndrome or acute/chronic kidney disease, with possible metabolic derangements. Further nephrological evaluation and clinical correlation are strongly recommended.
